items.title: Alphabet (GOOGL) Boosts Capex With $9B AI and Cloud Expansion
items.description: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) is one of the AI Stocks In The Spotlight For Investors. On August 14, Alphabet’s Google pledged that it will spend an additional $9 billion in Oklahoma over the next two years to expand cloud and artificial intelligence infrastructure. It announced that it will build a new data center campus in Stillwater and […]

items.title: Intel: Uncle Sam And SoftBank Increase The Potential Rebirth Of A Chip Legend
items.description: Intel's new CEO, SoftBank's $2B investment, and CHIPS Act support position Intel for growth. Read why INTC stock is a strong long-term buy.

items.title: Tracking Ken Fisher's Fisher Asset Management Portfolio - Q2 2025 Update
items.description: Fisher Asset Management's 13F portfolio grew from ~$231B to ~$252B in Q2 2025. Click here to read more about the trades and holdings in the portfolio.

items.title: Case Study Uncovers Major Gap in Sliding Screen Doors
items.description: When industry veteran Steve Tristan, founder of BestCustomScreens.com, set out to answer a simple but persistent homeowner's question—"Where can I buy an 8-foot fully assembled sliding screen door?"—he uncovered a revealing gap in the U.S. home improvement market.
